title: memecylon corticosum var. corticosum
intro: Memecylon corticosum var. corticosum, also known as the Corticosum Memecylon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is a shrub or small tree that is native to the tropical forests of Sri Lanka. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and treat fever, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The leaves and roots of the plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are said to offer health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health and immune system function.
